baselines.paper_or_system: Ahmed and Devanbu 2022 Few-shot project-specific code summarization
baselines.full_citation: T. Ahmed and P. Devanbu, 'Few-shot training LLMs for project-specific code summarization,' ASE 2022.
baselines.observed_issue: Repo cloned, environment worked, script reached API call, then failed because code-davinci-002 is deprecated.
baselines.decision: Keep as primary conceptual baseline and failed reproduction case.

baselines.full_citation: W. U. Ahmad, S. Chakraborty, B. Ray, and K.-W. Chang, 'A Transformer-based approach for source code summarization,' ACL 2020.
baselines.observed_issue: Repo cloned, dependencies repaired, pipeline launched, then failed because required Java dataset files were missing and download path did not produce a valid archive.
baselines.decision: Keep as secondary supervised baseline and failed reproduction case.

baselines.full_citation: S. Yun et al., 'P-CodeSum: Project-specific code summarization with in-context learning,' 2024.
baselines.observed_issue: Repo installed successfully, scripts launched, but default train.sh/evaluate.sh point to nonexistent data paths; repo contains alternate data dirs; log files created successfully.
baselines.decision: Keep as most promising runnable baseline.
